name: MarketMuse Content Intelligence API
what_it_does: AI-powered content intelligence platform with REST API — analyzing an entire website's topic coverage and competitive gaps, providing content briefs with difficulty scores, personalized difficulty metrics per site, and topic model maps to guide strategic content investment decisions.
use_cases: Querying MarketMuse topic difficulty and authority scores for content prioritization
Generating AI-powered content briefs for target topics via API
Pulling competitive content gap analysis to identify missing topic coverage
Integrating content quality and ROI scores into editorial calendar planning
Automating content audit by analyzing existing pages against topic models
not_for: Real-time content scoring during writing (use Clearscope or Surfer for editors)
Technical SEO auditing and crawl analysis
best_when: An enterprise content team or SEO agency needs strategic, data-driven decisions about which topics to create content for, based on site authority, competitive gaps, and ROI projections.
avoid_when: You need real-time content grading for writers (use Clearscope/Surfer), or you're a small site without enough content for topic authority modeling.

auth.notes: API key from MarketMuse account. Bearer token auth. Account-level access tied to subscription plan. No OAuth2 or scopes. No webhooks. Free plan has very limited API access.

pricing.notes: Atlanta-based company. Founded 2013. Raised $49M. AI first-mover in content intelligence. Personalized difficulty metric per site (vs generic). Topic model maps for strategic planning. Full-site analysis at launch. Used by major publishers and enterprises. Content ROI score unique to MarketMuse.

performance.rate_limits: API query limits per plan tier

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for topic research, content briefs, and page analysis. Bearer token auth. Moderate documentation. Domain must be registered in MarketMuse for personalized metrics. API query credits limited per plan. Topic analysis has processing time. No webhooks — synchronous or polling.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Topic data reads idempotent. Content brief reads idempotent by brief ID. New analysis requests consume query credits. Domain-level metrics idempotent by domain.
known_agent_gotchas: Domain must be configured in MarketMuse before personalized metrics are available
API query credits are limited per plan — check balance before bulk operations
Personalized difficulty differs from generic difficulty — specify which to use
Topic model processing can take minutes for new domains
No webhooks — implement polling for long-running analysis tasks

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. US data residency. Bearer token auth. Content intelligence data has low PII sensitivity. API key storage follows standard security practices.
